articles.title: Grayscale Drops XRP From Large Cap Crypto Fund Following Ripple SEC Suit
articles.description: Grayscale announced it ditched XRP on Dec. 31. Additionally, the firm's XRP Trust stopped accepting new subscriptions on Dec. 23.

articles.title: Grayscale Suspends XRP Trust Fund, Removes Ripple from Large-Cap Index
articles.description: Grayscale LLC has liquidated XRP positions from its Digital Large Cap Fund (OTCQX: GDLC) after the funds’ partner exchange temporarily suspended XRP trading. Grayscale Liquidates XRP Grayscale LLC liquidated its XRP position from the large-cap fund, which accounted for 1.46% of the portfolio. The fund was rebalanced on Jan. 4, 2021, during the fund’s quarterly review....
